mantras.name: Om

lines.meaning_english: The universal sound — the sound of creation
lines.meaning_telugu: Srusti dhvani — anni lokala mula dhvani

mantras.significance_english: Om is the most sacred sound in Hindu tradition. Chanting Om brings peace and focus.
mantras.significance_telugu: Om anni mantraalalo mukhyamainadhi. Om palikilhe manassu shantigaa untundi.

mantras.name: Saraswati Vandana

lines.meaning_english: She who is white like jasmine and moon
lines.meaning_telugu: Mallela laaga, chandrudu laaga telupu ga unnadi

lines.meaning_english: She who is dressed in pure white garments
She who holds the veena in her hands
She who sits on a white lotus

mantras.significance_english: Saraswati is the goddess of learning, music, and wisdom. This prayer is recited before studying.
mantras.significance_telugu: Saraswati devi vidhya, sangeetam, gnananiki devata. Chaduvukunna mundu ee mantramu cheppaali.

mantras.name: Om Namah Shivaya

lines.meaning_english: I bow to Lord Shiva again
With full devotion I bow to Lord Shiva

mantras.significance_english: One of the most powerful mantras dedicated to Lord Shiva. Brings peace, strength and protection.
mantras.significance_telugu: Shivunki sampardhinche gudu mantramu. Shanthi, shakti, rakshana istundi.

mantras.name: Gayatri Mantra

lines.meaning_english: We meditate on the earth, sky and heaven
We meditate on the divine light of the Sun
May the divine light illuminate our minds
lines.meaning_telugu: Aa divya jyoti manamu manossu prakashimpajeyali

lines.meaning_english: May it inspire our wisdom and intellect
lines.meaning_telugu: Manam manchi alochanalu chesukune shakti ivvali

mantras.significance_english: The most sacred Vedic mantra. Gayatri mantra is a prayer for wisdom, knowledge and enlightenment.
mantras.significance_telugu: Anni vedhika mantraalalo mokhyamainadhi. Gnaanam, vivekam kosam chesukune praarthana.

mantras.name: Telugu Lullaby
mantras.significance_english: Traditional Telugu lullaby sung to put children to sleep. Very soothing and calming.
mantras.significance_telugu: Pillalanu nidra poinchadaaniki padhe parampara Telugu laali paata.
